content.body:
Extends TreeSitterASTExtractor with JS/TS/TSX grammar support. Extracts
class declarations, function declarations, and const/let arrow functions
at module level. TSX additionally captures JSX-assigned arrow functions.

Fixtures: sample.js, sample.ts, sample.tsx.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat(cartographer): add JavaScript, TypeScript, and TSX AST extraction
content.summary:
add JavaScript, TypeScript, and TSX AST extraction. Extends TreeSitterASTExtractor with JS/TS/TSX grammar support. Extracts
class declarations, function declarations, and const/let arrow functions
